module.name: no-export-alias
module.description: Prevent use of alias in export statements.

scenarios.name: should allow exporting a binding by its own name
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the export declaration

scenarios.name: should report an aliased named export
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the export specifier
scenarios.then: a noExportAlias violation is reported on the specifier

scenarios.name: should report a local aliased named export
scenarios.given: const foo = 1; export { foo as myFoo }
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the export specifier
